key_findings: Anomaly types that transfer poorly: local_outlier, cluster_boundary. These may require specialized handling during distillation.
Anomaly types that transfer well: global_outlier. The student successfully learns to detect these.
Best transferring knowledge: isolation (87.1% retention). Worst: local_structure (74.4% retention).
High anomaly collapse rate (21.3%). Student frequently misses anomalies the teacher detected.
